steps.title: Understand vertical translation
steps.content: Translating down by 8 units means every y-coordinate decreases by 8. We apply this by subtracting 8 from the right side of the equation.

steps.title: Write the translated equation
steps.content:
Original equation: $y = 9x$

After translating down 8 units:
$$y = 9x - 8$$
This matches choice B — B is correct.
